title: eritrichium scouleri
intro: Eritrichium scouleri, also known as Scouler's woolly beardtongue or Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Eritrichium scouleri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
